mnemonics: Make Every Computer Talk To Each Other Now
Little Clocks Keep Time For Everyone Now
keyPoints: Logical time is used to coordinate clocks in distributed systems
Logical clocks are used to resolve conflicts in distributed systems
Logical clocks are ordered based on the event timestamp
The total order of events is not always preserved
The concept of 'happens before' is used to resolve conflicts
Logical clocks can be either weak or strong
Weak logical clocks only guarantee that events are ordered
Strong logical clocks provide a total order of events
